App Store Connect API 2.0+

```
object SubscriptionUpdateRequest.Data.Attributes
```

## [Properties](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/subscriptionupdaterequest/data-data.dictionary/attributes-data.dictionary#properties)

`name``string`
